caption: A man sits at a desk in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, a black sweatshirt with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold lettering, a gold chain, and a gold watch. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind him is a white banner featuring yellow stars and the word "HUSTLE" repeated vertically. Above the banner, blue text reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk, a black equipment box and a blue container with "BOSS TALK" text are visible. In the lower-left corner, a logo displays "BOSS TALK". Throughout the sequence, the man remains relatively still, looking slightly to his left while holding a piece of paper in his hands. There is very little movement between the frames, capturing a steady moment of him listening or preparing to speak during a recording session.
